description:
A Nordic broadband communications startup, ArcticLink, is designing a Molniya constellation to serve customers in high latitudes. Based on the orbit requirements specification document at ~/Desktop/arcticlink_orbit_spec.txt, design a Molniya orbit in GMAT using a high-fidelity force model (including Earth gravity harmonics of at least degree/order 4, atmospheric drag, and SRP). Propagate the spacecraft for 30 days and save the GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/molniya_mission.script. Generate an analysis report at ~/GMAT_output/molniya_analysis.txt with the following exactly labeled fields:
SMA_km: <value>
ECC: <value>
INC_deg: <value>
AOP_initial_deg: <value>
AOP_final_deg: <value>
AOP_drift_deg: <magnitude of drift>
apogee_alt_km: <value>
perigee_alt_km: <value>
period_hours: <value>

Login: username=ga, password=password123
